'''Dvakvar Grahrk''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and user of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark side of the Force]] who hunted down [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

==Biography==
Dvakvar Grahrk was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who hunted down members of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Though the Devaronian was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Grahrk also learned the power of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark side of the Force]]. Grahrk spent [[Time/Legends|time]] on<ref name="DVD" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]],<ref name="KOTOR2">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref> where they fought [[Kath hound/Legends|Kath hounds]] at<ref name="DVD" /> the ruined [[Jedi Enclave]]<ref name="KOTOR2" /> and fought [[Kinrath/Legends|kinrath]] on the plains<ref name="DVD" /> near the [[Khoonda]] government building.<ref name="KOTOR2" /> Grahrk also visited<ref name="DVD" /> the planet [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], where in the abandoned [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]],<ref name="KOTOR2" /> they fought and [[Death/Legends|killed]]<ref name="DVD" /> [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] that aided the [[Sith Triumvirate]].<ref name="KOTOR2" />  

==Personality and traits==
Grahrk had [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="DVD" />

==Powers and abilities==
A user of the Force, Grahrk used<ref name="DVD" /> the powers [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] and [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force crush]]<ref name="KOTOR2" /> to kill Sith assassins.<ref name="DVD" />

==Equipment==
While on Dantooine, the Devaronian wore [[flex heavy armor]] with a head device and duel wielded an [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blaster]] and a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]]. As they fought kath hounds and kinrath, Grahrk also wore [[Neo-Crusader assault armor]], a head visor, and used two purple-colored [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]]. On Korriban, they wore dark-colored [[Clothing/Legends|robes]] and wielded a cyan-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="DVD" />

==Behind the scenes==
During the development of the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', the character of Dvakvar Grahrk was created as a substitute for the then unfinished Disciple, a companion of the player character. Grahrk was first revealed in a companion DVD to the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]].<ref name="DVD" />
